descriptions: PLA collaborated with ANM to establish Heroes of Return.
edges.evidence_quote: In collaboration with the Palestine Liberation Organisation's (PLO) Palestinian Liberation Army (PLA), the ANM established the Abtal al-Audah (Heroes of Return) commando group in early summer 1966.

Sun Yee On.description: Sun Yee On is one of the leading triads in Hong Kong and China, founded in 1919 by Heung Chin. It has over 25,000 members worldwide and is active in multiple countries including the UK, US, France, and Belgium. The triad is involved in racketeering, counterfeiting, extortion, drug trafficking, money laundering, murder, and illegal gambling. It remains active as of the present day.

descriptions: 14K and Sun Yee On are rivals, with 14K being the second largest triad.
edges.evidence_quote: They are the main rival of the Sun Yee On , which is the largest triad.

descriptions: Sun Yee On is a constituent triad of Sam Gor.
edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel allies with Sun Yee On to acquire precursor chemicals.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sinaloa Federation has also formed alliances with two powerful Chinese triads , Sun Yee On and the 14K Triad , to acquire the precursor chemicals needed in creating highly-addictive synthetic drugs like methamphetamine, and now, likely fentanyl.

descriptions: Sun Yee On competes with 14K in the fictional setting of Black Lagoon.
edges.evidence_quote: In the anime adaptation of Black Lagoon, the Thai branch of Sun Yee On, led by a man named Wan, is based in the fictional city of Roanapur and competes with the other organised crime syndicates in the city like the 14K.

descriptions: Infobox lists American Mafia as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Camorra as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Wo On Lok as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Sinaloa Cartel as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Wah Ching as a rival of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K, Wah Ching, Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: Infobox lists Wo Hop To as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo members murdered a Sun Yee On boss, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Lee Tai-lung (李泰龍), a Sun Yee On boss in Tsim Sha Tsui, was murdered in front of the Kowloon Shangri-La hotel on 4 August 2009 by members of the Wo Shing Wo gang.

descriptions: Wah Ching has strong associations with Sun Yee On triad.
edges.evidence_quote: There is law enforcement anecdotal evidence that suggests as a group the gang has developed strong associations with other Asian organized crime groups, such as the 14K and Sun Yee On triads in Hong Kong.

descriptions: Wo Hop To is affiliated with Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Wo Hop To specialises in protection rackets and is affiliated with the Sun Yee On triad.

descriptions: A Wo Shing Wo leader masterminded the murder of a Sun Yee On leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Leung Kwok-chung, aka "Tattooed Chung" (high-ranking leader of the Tai Kok Tsui branch of Wo Shing Wo and the mastermind behind the murder of Lee Tai-lung, the dragon head of Tsim Sha Tsui branch of Sun Yee On ).

descriptions: Sun Yee On is listed as a rival of Wo Shing Wo in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K , Ah Kong , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok

descriptions: Chauns MC is a support club of Sin City Deciples.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the group's support clubs include the Street Misfitz MC, Black Angels MC, So Solid Ryders MC, Ridin’ Like We Stole It MC, and Chauns MC.

FFF (gang).description: FFF was a gang centered in the San Fernando Valley during the 1980s, unique for its membership of White Americans from middle and upper middle class backgrounds. It was founded by members of a punk rock band of the same name. The gang's activities largely ended after prominent member Mark Miller was fatally shot in 1985.

descriptions: Nyatura was an allied militia of M23.
edges.evidence_quote: the M23 relied on allied militias, including Nyatura

New Springville Boys.description: The New Springville Boys was an Italian-American recruitment gang or farm team for the American Mafia, specifically the Bonanno and Colombo crime families. Based in Staten Island, New York, the gang operated from the 1980s to the 2000s, engaging in burglary, robbery, loan sharking, money laundering, drug trafficking, and hijacking. Members were indicted for burglarizing night-deposit boxes across the country and other crimes.

descriptions: New Springville Boys is a farm team for the Bonanno family.
edges.evidence_quote: The New Springville Boys – a 'farm team' for the Bonanno and Colombo families

descriptions: The New Springville Boys served as a recruitment gang for the American Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The New Springville Boys was an Italian-American recruitment gang or "farm team" for the American Mafia

descriptions: The New Springville Boys was a farm team specifically for the Bonanno crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: specifically the Bonanno crime family

descriptions: The New Springville Boys were allied with the Colombo crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family Colombo crime family

Georgian mafia.description: The Georgian mafia is an organized crime network originating in Georgia, known for producing the largest number of 'thieves in law' in post-Soviet states. It controls and regulates many Russian-speaking mafia groups and is active in Russia and Europe. The organization has two major clans from Tbilisi and Kutaisi, with the Kutaisi Clan being particularly well represented. Its criminal activities include arms trafficking, extortion, money laundering, and murder.

descriptions: Kutaisi Clan is a major criminal clan within the Georgian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Georgian mafia has two major criminal clans from Tbilisi and Kutaisi.

descriptions: Tbilisi Clan is a major criminal clan within the Georgian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Georgian mafia has two major criminal clans from Tbilisi and Kutaisi.

descriptions: Mkhedrioni was led by a former thief-in-law, indicating ties to Georgian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mkhedrioni led by former thief-in-law Jaba Ioseliani

'Ndrina Costanzo.description: The 'Ndrina Costanzo is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in the area of Catanzaro, Italy. It is allied with the Arena clan of Isola di Capo Rizzuto. The clan is led by Girolamo Costanzo, who is currently imprisoned.

descriptions: Costanzo is listed as an ally of Arena in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Carpino, Costanzo, Dragone, Gaglianesi, Mannolo, Trapasso

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Costanzo is allied with the Arena clan.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Costanzo è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della zona di Catanzaro alleata con gli Arena di Isola di Capo Rizzuto .

La Empresa.description: Colombian drug trafficking cartel based in Medellín, founded in the late 1990s by Gerardo Santana Garza and Luis Mendez. It is a breakaway group from the Juárez Cartel and traffics cocaine, heroin, MDMA, fentanyl, marijuana, and pink cocaine. The cartel operates in Colombia, Mexico, and other regions, and has been involved in conflicts with former Juárez Cartel members.

descriptions: La Empresa is a hybrid organization derived from Barrio Azteca.
edges.evidence_quote: Mendez, who was the El Paso FBI office's most wanted fugitive and the last person sought for the attacks, also made La Empresa a hybrid of Barrio Azteca.

descriptions: La Empresa is listed as an opponent of AGC in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ELN , FARC dissidents , La Oficina , La Empresa , Alianza Fronteriza

descriptions: Barrio Azteca is listed as an ally of La Empresa in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Juárez Cartel , La Linea , Barrio Azteca

descriptions: La Empresa is a criminal cell associated with Los Aztecas (Barrio Azteca).
edges.evidence_quote: tres integrantes de La Empresa (una célula delictiva asociada con Los Aztecas)

descriptions: Juárez Cartel members became adversaries of La Empresa.
edges.evidence_quote: many of the Juárez Cartel members became adversaries of the cartel

descriptions: La Empresa broke away from Juárez Cartel, and Juárez members became adversaries.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel is alleged to be a "breakaway" cartel of the Juárez Cartel , many of the Juárez Cartel members became adversaries of the cartel

descriptions: La Linea is listed as an ally of La Empresa in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Juárez Cartel , La Linea , Barrio Azteca

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel is listed as a rival of La Empresa in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: La Empresa is listed as an ally of La Línea in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... La Empresa

descriptions: Los Mexicles lists La Nueva Empresa as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... La Nueva Empresa

descriptions: La Empresa is listed as an ally of Tren de Aragua in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Primeiro Comando da Capital , Comando Vermelho , La Empresa , La Linea , La Unión Tepito , Jalisco New Generation Cartel , Los Tiguerones (from November 2023) , Los Lobos

Polverino clan.description: The Polverino clan is a Neapolitan Camorra clan based in Marano di Napoli, Italy, founded by Giuseppe Polverino in the 1990s. It emerged as a ramification of the Nuvoletta clan and became independent, known for monopolizing hashish importation from Morocco to Italy via Spain. The clan operates in various Italian regions and has a strong presence in Spain, particularly in Barcelona, Málaga, and Alicante. It is considered one of the most powerful Camorra groups in Spain.

descriptions: The Polverino clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Polverino clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Also in 2019, relatives of top members belonging to the Polverino clan claim three million euros to the Spanish State of compensation after their relatives were acquitted by the National Court of the crime of money laundering for which they were arrested in 2013 and tried in 2016.

descriptions: Polverino clan is listed as an ally of Licciardi clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Contini clan, Mallardo clan, Nuvoletta clan, Polverino clan, Moccia clan, Giuliano clan, Catania Mafia family, 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Polverino replaced Clan Nuvoletta and has strong family ties to it.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan è stato sostituito sul territorio dai Polverino e Orlando , entrambi con forti legami di parentela con i Nuvoletta.

descriptions: The Polverino clan succeeded the Nuvoletta clan after its decline.
edges.evidence_quote: the clan was succeeded by the Polverino and Orlando clans

descriptions: Polverino clan is an ally of the Mallardo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Polverino clan

descriptions: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, the leader of the Polverino clan before his arrest, was considered the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: Polverino clan supplied hashish to 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, was dubbed the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: Polverino clan is allied with Licciardi clan per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuvoletta clan, Orlando clan, Mallardo clan, Lubrano-Ligato clan, Licciardi clan, Cosa Nostra

descriptions: Polverino clan is allied with Lubrano-Ligato clan per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuvoletta clan, Orlando clan, Mallardo clan, Lubrano-Ligato clan, Licciardi clan, Cosa Nostra

descriptions: Polverino clan is the successor of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the investigations, the Polverinos are considered the successors of the Nuvoletta clan.

descriptions: Polverino clan originated as a ramification of the Nuvoletta clan and later surpassed them.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan started as a ramification of the Nuvoletta clan, but has become independent and one of the most powerful groups of the Camorra over the time, surpassing the Nuvolettas

descriptions: Polverino clan is allied with Orlando clan per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuvoletta clan, Orlando clan, Mallardo clan, Lubrano-Ligato clan, Licciardi clan, Cosa Nostra

descriptions: Polverino clan is allied with Mallardo clan per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuvoletta clan, Orlando clan, Mallardo clan, Lubrano-Ligato clan, Licciardi clan, Cosa Nostra

descriptions: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, the leader of the Polverino clan before his arrest, was considered the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: Polverino clan supplied hashish to Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, was dubbed the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sicilian Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, the leader of the Polverino clan before his arrest, was considered the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sicilian Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, was dubbed the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: The two gangs were in a violent conflict over control of labor slugging.
edges.evidence_quote: Rosenzweig's dominance was challenged in 1913, when Philip "Pinchey" Paul began a war with Rosenzweig, lasting over several months.

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia Salentina aggregated former members of Famiglia Salentina Libera.
edges.evidence_quote: A seguito della "pace" stipulata da Pantaleo De Matteis (detto Pantaluccio ) e dal cognato Salvatore Rizzo con la SCU di Rogoli, nel 1986 nacque nel carcere di Lecce la Nuova Famiglia Salentina , aggregando i vecchi associati della Famiglia Salentina Libera , l'organizzazione fondata nei primi anni ottanta da Rizzo nel carcere di Pianosa .

descriptions: Famiglia Salentina Libera changed its name to Nuova Famiglia Salentina.
edges.evidence_quote: la pace siglata nel carcere di Lecce tra Pino Rogoli e la Famiglia Salentina Libera, guidata dal boss leccese Salvatore Rizzo e dal cognato Pantaleo De Matteis, che cambiò nome in Nuova Famiglia Salentina (NFL)

descriptions: Famiglia Salentina Libera was formed in response to SCU's formation.
edges.evidence_quote: In risposta alla formazione della SCU, nacque nel carcere di Pianosa la Famiglia Salentina Libera (F.S.L.)

descriptions: Los Viagras is a sub-unit of the LNFM Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras ... is an armed wing of the LNFM Cartel in the state of Michoacán, Mexico.

descriptions: Iron Bloods 58 is a Bandidos support club.
edges.evidence_quote: Five members of the Hagen Bandidos chapter as well as the president of the Iron Bloods 58, a Bandidos support club, were charged in August 2019 with committing violent crimes during a conflict with the rival Freeway Riders Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: East Side Longos harassed Cambodian refugees who later founded Asian Boyz, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The founders of Long Beach Asian Boyz were originally Cambodian refugees who the East Side Longos were harassing during the 1980s.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang lists East Side Longos as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K Triad, Bloods, Piru Street Boys, Crips, East Side Longos, 211 Crew, Soldiers of Aryan Culture, Aryan Circle, Aryan Brotherhood, Nazi Lowriders, Aryan Nations, Lynwood Vikings

descriptions: TRG had a violent rivalry with East Side Longo in early 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Tiny Rascals Gang had a violent rivalry with the Long Beach-based East Side Longos, who were predominantly Hispanic , during the early 1990s.

descriptions: Mexican Mafia ordered West Side Longo to support East Side Longo against TRG.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mexican Mafia ordered the West Side Longo gang to put aside its rivalry with the East Side Longo and support their former rivals against the TRG.

descriptions: West Side Longo put aside rivalry with East Side Longo to cooperate against TRG.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mexican Mafia ordered the West Side Longo gang to put aside its rivalry with the East Side Longo and support their former rivals against the TRG.

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was rivals with the Williams Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Williams Syndicate, Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (until the early 90s)

descriptions: These two factions were in conflict during the Faida di Palmi.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello -Condello

descriptions: Gallico and Parrello-Condello were in a feud starting in 1977.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello

Evil Corp.description: Russian hacking group behind the Dridex banking trojan, active since 2009. Operates with a hierarchical structure similar to traditional organized crime, led by Maksim Yakubets from Moscow. Specializes in stealing banking credentials and cryptocurrency through phishing campaigns. The group has been linked to significant financial theft globally.

descriptions: The leader of Evil Corp was a personal friend of a core member of Jabber Zeus.
edges.evidence_quote: Yakubets was a personal friend of core member or leader of the Jabber Zeus hacking group Vyacheslav Penchukov

descriptions: Necurs is listed as an author of Dridex, which is an alias of Evil Corp.
edges.evidence_quote: Authors: Necurs , Maksim Yakubets

descriptions: Evil Corp may be using Raspberry Robin's infrastructure for attacks.
edges.evidence_quote: IBM suggested that Evil Corp may be using Raspberry Robin infrastructure to carry out attacks.

descriptions: An Evil Corp member participated in a hackathon organized by Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: in December 2022, Igor Turashev and his company placed third in a hackathon organized by the Wagner Group

descriptions: The Corleonesi were rivals of the Di Cristina faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Giuseppe Di Cristina

descriptions: Dirty Knuckles MC is a support club allied with Cossacks MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dirty Knuckles MC (support club)

descriptions: Club Deroes and Gods Garbage cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: Gods Garbage and Coffin Cheaters cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: Gods Garbage, along with three other clubs, cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob from Perth.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: Gypsy Jokers and Gods Garbage cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.
